sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_tile: Combinational FP32-to-centered-integer quantization for a flattened tile using Q15 scale.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_gemm: Combinational integer matrix multiply over centered quantized A and B tiles with INT32 saturated outputs.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_tile: Combinational INT32 accumulator dequantization to FP32 using the product of Q15 scales.
